g.onclick: sendPrompt('Teach me stage 1 of HTML: getting started — what HTML is, how browsers work, and writing my first page')
g.text: What HTML is · how browsers render pages · your first .html file

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Teach me stage 2 of HTML: core document structure — DOCTYPE, html, head, body, meta tags, and the title element')
sendPrompt('Teach me stage 3 of HTML: text and headings — h1 to h6, paragraphs, line breaks, strong, em, and inline text elements')
sendPrompt('Teach me stage 4 of HTML: links and images — anchor tags, href, target, relative vs absolute paths, img, alt text, and src')
g.text: · relative vs absolute paths · · alt text

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Teach me stage 5 of HTML: lists — ordered lists, unordered lists, list items, and nested lists')
sendPrompt('Teach me stage 6 of HTML: tables — table, thead, tbody, tr, th, td, colspan and rowspan')
sendPrompt('Teach me stage 7 of HTML: forms — form element, input types, labels, buttons, select, textarea, and form attributes')
sendPrompt('Teach me stage 8 of HTML: semantic HTML5 elements — header, nav, main, article, section, aside, footer and why they matter')
sendPrompt('Teach me stage 9 of HTML: accessibility and best practices — ARIA roles, alt attributes, lang attribute, valid HTML, and validation tools')
g.text: ARIA roles · lang attr · valid HTML · W3C validator · screen readers

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What should I learn after HTML basics? Give me a roadmap for CSS and JavaScript')
g.text: What's next? → CSS · JavaScript · Responsive design
